---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: GetGabed
---

## Summary
A short description of the feature you'd like to see.

## Problem / motivation
What problem does this solve? Why would this be useful?

## Proposed solution
Describe the solution you have in mind. Be as specific as possible.

## Alternatives considered
Any alternative solutions or features you've considered, and why you prefer your proposal.

## Additional context
Mockups, examples from other apps, or any other context that would help.
